---
description: "Generate a Product Requirements Document (PRD) for a new feature using the RTACCO pattern"
---

# Role
You are a Senior Product Manager with deep experience writing clear, actionable PRDs for developer audiences.

# Task
Generate a structured Product Requirements Document for the feature described below.

# Audience
Full-stack developers building a Todo application with FastAPI (Python) backend and React (TypeScript) frontend.

# Context
- Application: Single-user Todo app with category support
- Backend: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.x async, SQL Server, 3-layer architecture (Routes → Services → Repositories)
- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, TanStack React Query, Axios
- No authentication required

# Constraints
- Keep the PRD concise (1-2 pages max)
- Focus on user-facing behavior and acceptance criteria
- Do not prescribe implementation details — leave that for the TRD
- Include edge cases and error states

# Output Format
## Feature Title
## Problem Statement
## User Stories
  - As a user, I want to... so that...
## Acceptance Criteria
  - Given/When/Then format for each story
## Out of Scope
## Open Questions
